title: elaeocarpus avium
intro: Elaeocarpus avium, also known as the blue berry ash, is a plant species belonging to the Elaeocarpaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus avium include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Elaeocarpus avium can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, allowing for a versatile range of herbal preparations to suit different needs and preferences.
